# China AI Digest

> Independent coverage of China's artificial intelligence industry — policy, research, and companies.

China AI Digest is an English-language editorial publication tracking developments in China's AI ecosystem. We translate and synthesize primary Chinese-language sources — government filings, research papers, company announcements, and industry reporting — into accurate, in-depth coverage for a global audience.

## Coverage Areas

- **AI Policy**: Chinese government regulations, national strategies, and regulatory filings
- **Research**: Model releases, technical benchmarks, and breakthroughs from Chinese universities and labs
- **Companies**: Startups, established tech companies, and funding rounds in China's AI sector
- **Industry**: Infrastructure, chips, data, and deployment at scale

## Editorial Standards

All articles are grounded in primary Chinese-language sources. Factual claims, numbers, and proper nouns are verified before publication. Corrections are issued promptly.

## Contact

hello@chinaaidigest.com

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://chinaaidigest.com/
- Latest articles: https://chinaaidigest.com/latest/
- RSS feed: https://chinaaidigest.com/rss.xml
- About: https://chinaaidigest.com/about/
- Sitemap: https://chinaaidigest.com/sitemap-index.xml
